blended.narrative: Stowe is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 5.7 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 265 ft. Looking ahead, 18 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 5" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 3.2" of snow, highs of 22°F. Expect powder.
Thursday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
